title: Protection Specialist Centre (PSC)
text:
Protection Specialist Centre (PSC) - SupportGoWhere
Protection Specialist Centre (PSC)
Share link
Provides services for individuals and families experiencing family violence, intimate partner violence or sexual violence.
SERVICE HIGHLIGHTS
Centre-based
Free
Referral not required
SERVICE PROVIDERS
Find service providers near you
Collapse all sections
About this support

Protection Specialist Centres (PSC) provide a holistic range of socio-emotional, supportive and practical services to survivors, including their families and other vulnerable members in the family in order to address the danger and likelihood of future harm posed to the survivors and meet the survivors’ needs.

Services provided include:

Casework

Counselling

Application of personal protection orders

Who is this for?

Survivors of family violence, intimate partner violence or sexual violence

Persons who abuse

Vulnerable family members who are witnesses of abuse or neglect/self-neglect.

What to expect?

Clients who approach or are referred to the centres will undergo an interview where caseworkers will assess the client’s needs.

Appropriate information, referral and/or services will then be provided.

How to apply?

You may refer to the Service Providers section and call or email any of the centres for assistance.
